name: levelup
description: Modular NFT minting and rewards protocol on Stacks with Clarity contracts and a React frontend
author: MintForge Contributors

scripts.check: npm run contracts:check && npm run test
scripts.verify:local: npm run check && npm run frontend:test
scripts.check:fast: npm run contracts:check && npm run frontend:smoke
scripts.verify:production: npm run frontend:check && npm run build
scripts.scripts:install: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts install || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
scripts.scripts:wallets: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts run generate:wallets || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
scripts.scripts:distribute: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts run distribute:stx || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
scripts.scripts:interact: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts run interact:core || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
scripts.scripts:interact:token: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts run interact:token || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
scripts.scripts:consolidate: [ -f scripts/package.json ] && npm --prefix scripts run consolidate || (echo "scripts/package.json is missing. Add the scripts package before running this command." && exit 1)
